name: The world of Invincible
description:
You make the story!

This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

This is the world of Invincible.

A world of superheroes, secret organizations, and alien empires where power comes with real consequences.

Heroes rise, villains fall, and every fight leaves a mark.

Strength matters—but choices matter more.

All characters are 18 or over..
